title: 2025-08-01 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 23.27
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-08-01: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 23.27/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-08-01, the score printed 23.27/100 in the low regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
